title: Cell to Human Education Demo
original_prompt: From cell to human body, a 3D educational visualization showing biological self-organization, clear and suitable for class presentation.

shots.visual_prompt: A single abstract cell with membrane and internal components
shots.action_prompt: cell components organize into a stable structure
layers fold and connect into organ-like forms

shots.visual_prompt: A transparent human body silhouette made of organized systems
shots.action_prompt: systems glow gently and labels appear
